title: Stay informed about medical devices - Canada.ca
content:
## Stay informed about medical devices
Keep up to date about medical devices that are authorized in Canada. Staying informed helps you use these devices safely and reduce your risk.
- Subscribe to updates for breast implants and vaginal surgical mesh
- Subscribe to recalls and safety alerts for breast implants and other products
- Subscribe to the RSS feed
The personal information you provide to Health Canada is:
- handled in accordance with the Privacy Act
- used by the Medical Devices Directorate under the authority of the Food and Drugs Act and its Regulations

### Why we collect your personal information
We need your email address to provide you with a subscription service for updates related to your chosen medical device(s). We'll use your information to send you email updates of the latest publications as they're posted on the website.
You may also choose to provide us with your demographic information. We'll use this information to:
- understand our prospective audience in regards to your chosen medical device(s) this will inform future opportunities for consultations related to your chosen medical device(s)
- this will inform future opportunities for consultations related to your chosen medical device(s)
- support our mandate to provide information so that you can make informed decisions about your health

### How else we use or share your personal information
We may also share de-identified and aggregated demographic information with the Communications and Public Affairs Branch. This lets us improve social media and other potential communication strategies. Improving these supports our mandate of providing information so that you can make informed decisions about your health.
In accordance with the Access to Information Act and Privacy Act , we will not disclose your personal information without your consent.

### If you don't want to provide your personal information
If you choose not to provide your email address, we won't be able to send you updates. If you are a subscriber and wish to cancel your subscription, you can unsubscribe at any time. If you unsubscribe, we'll remove your email address from our subscription list and you will no longer receive updates.
If you wish to change your subscription email, you must cancel your subscription and re-subscribe.
Providing your demographic information is voluntary and there are no consequences if you do not provide it.
You have the right to:
- access and request corrections and notations to your personal information
- complain to the Privacy Commissioner of Canada if you feel your personal information has been handled improperly
Contact us for more information about these rights, or about how we handle your personal information:
Email: mdd.postmarket-postcommercialisation.dim@hc-sc.gc.ca .

### For more information
Info Source describes the collection of your personal information at infosource.gc.ca . Refer to the personal information bank (PIB) HC PSU 914 Public Communications .

## Subscribe to updates for breast implants and vaginal surgical mesh
You can subscribe to receive information on authorized breast implants and vaginal surgical mesh. These device updates are available through 2 separate subscription lists.
Timely and relevant updates for breast implants include:
- safety or recall information
- current data on breast implant-associated anaplastic large cell lymphoma reported to Health Canada
Timely and relevant updates for vaginal surgical mesh include:
- safety or recall information
Choose the list that you wish to receive information from. Enter your email address and click on the " Subscribe " button.
Required fields are marked with an asterisk ( * ).

### To change your subscription email:
To change your subscription email, you have to first unsubscribe and then give a new email address to re-subscribe.
If you are already a subscriber and wish to unsubscribe, type in your email address in the following box and choose the " Unsubscribe " button.

## Subscribe to recalls and safety alerts for breast implants and other  products
You can also subscribe to receive recalls and safety alerts  specifically for breast implants or other medical devices.
Through the subscribe feature, you can also choose to  receive recalls and alerts for items listed under the following groups:
Subscribe  to recalls and safety alerts
Recalls and safety alerts are included when you subscribe  for breast implant updates. So you may receive the same information twice.

## Subscribe to the RSS feed
Health Canada provides RSS (Really  Simple Syndication) feeds of our news releases and advisories, warnings and recalls.  One of our RSS feeds brings you to up-to-date  information on medical devices.
Medical Devices RSS feed
To view an RSS feed  online in your RSS reader or aggregator:
- Copy the URL link located beside  the topic of your choice.
- Paste the URL link into your  reader.
Do this for  each topic.
Learn more  about our other RSS feeds .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
